Job Title: Power Platform Consultant

Brief Description

We are seeking a Mid-Level Power Platform Consultant with strong hands-on experience in business process automation using Microsoft Power Platform, with a primary focus on Power Automate Desktop (RPA) and Copilot Studio. The consultant will operate as an implementation-focused developer, responsible for building, testing, and maintaining automation solutions using low-code technologies, combining cloud workflows, robotic process automation, and AI-powered conversational experiences. This role is intended for technical professionals who deliver solutions directly, collaborating with senior architects and analysts on design, governance, and scalability aspects.

Position Overview

The Power Platform Consultant will work mainly on the implementation and evolution of automation solutions using Microsoft Power Platform technologies. The role focuses on technical delivery activities, including solution development, integration, testing, deployment, and maintenance, ensuring stability, performance, and compliance with defined standards for European and global clients.

Key Responsibilities

  • Implement automation solutions based on defined functional and technical requirements.
  • Develop Power Automate cloud flows for event-driven automation, approvals, and system integrations.
  • Build Power Automate Desktop flows for attended and unattended RPA scenarios.
  • Automate interactions with legacy and non-API systems using UI and system automation.
  • Implement exception handling, logging, retries, and resiliency mechanisms in automation flows.
  • Combine cloud flows and desktop flows to deliver end-to-end automated processes.
  • Develop Power Apps (Canvas and basic Model-driven apps) to support automation scenarios.
  • Build and configure Copilot Studio chatbots for operational use cases (HR, IT, Operations).
  • Integrate Copilot Studio solutions with Power Automate workflows and Dataverse.
  • Configure conversation flows, triggers, fallback logic, and human escalation paths.
  • Model and manage data structures in Dataverse, including tables, relationships, and security roles.
  • Integrate automation solutions with Microsoft 365 (Teams, SharePoint, Outlook).
  • Support integrations with external systems using standard or custom connectors.
  • Apply Power Platform best practices related to environment strategy (Dev/Test/Prod), solution management, and DLP policies.
  • Support Application Lifecycle Management (ALM) using solutions and deployment pipelines.
  • Package, deploy, and update solutions across environments.
  • Produce and maintain technical documentation, user guides, and automation runbooks.
  • Support technical training and knowledge transfer related to delivered solutions.
  • Troubleshoot automation failures and apply corrective and optimization improvements.

Preferred Skills

  • Power Automate (Cloud): advanced flow implementation, conditions, expressions, approvals, and integrations.
  • Power Automate Desktop (RPA): UI and system automation, attended and unattended execution, stability, and maintenance best practices.
  • Copilot Studio: topic flow implementation, conversation logic, and integrations with Power Automate and Dataverse.
  • Power Apps: Canvas apps and basic Model-driven app customization, formulas, components, and responsive layouts.
  • Dataverse: table design, relationships, business rules, security roles, and solution layering.

Technical & Delivery Skills

  • Strong hands-on automation and implementation mindset.
  • Ability to independently develop and maintain medium-complexity automation solutions.
  • Attention to reliability, error handling, and long-term maintainability of automation flows.
  • Ability to work with technical specifications, functional inputs, and defined solution designs.
  • Clear and structured technical documentation and handover skills.

Nice-to-Have Skills

  • Experience with AI Builder (document processing, form recognition).
  • Experience with Power Pages.
  • Exposure to Azure Logic Apps, Azure Functions, or APIs.
  • Experience integrating automation solutions with Microsoft Teams.

Experience & Education

  • 2–4 years of hands-on experience delivering Power Platform solutions.
  • Proven production experience with Power Automate Desktop (RPA).
  • Experience implementing at least one Copilot Studio solution.
  • Microsoft certifications are a plus (PL-200, PL-500, Copilot Studio credentials).

Application Note: Please mention the post you are applying for with your experience/current location in the subject line (mandatory).
